description: Adversarial composition — inputs designed to force domain collision, lens overload, or contradiction injection. Validates priority ordering, single-domain dominance, and boundary stability under pressure.

cases.input: automation of fundraising roles in leasing companies
cases.note: Multi-domain pressure: auto/lease/role all present but 'fundraising' protected gate dominates unconditionally. Desired: one primary domain from structural keywords, not HEALTH.

cases.input: the entire automated fundraising role leasing strategy
cases.note: Same protected-gate domination in a maximally adversarial composition.

cases.input: analyze car purchase investor retirement career lens
cases.note: Lens overload: car/retirement/career all present. 'car' is explicit AUTO keyword and wins deterministically. Correct behavior.

cases.input: this lease is not a lease but a release of liability
cases.note: Contradiction injection: lease appears twice as standalone word; release has \b protection. AUTO wins on lease match. Correct — boundary logic stable under negation context.

cases.input: job offer negotiation with equity upside
cases.note: Multi-keyword: job + offer + negotiat all fire CAREER. No leakage into RETIREMENT or REAL_ESTATE.

cases.input: job offer negotiation with equity upside
cases.note: Same input as D4a — cross-assertion: CAREER must not bleed into RETIREMENT despite equity keyword.

cases.input: job offer negotiation with equity upside
cases.note: Same input as D4a — cross-assertion: CAREER must not bleed into REAL_ESTATE despite equity keyword.
